name: voice_output
description: Text-to-speech via ElevenLabs. DI can speak aloud during heartbeat or on demand.

voice_name.label: Voice name (display only, for your reference)

speak_on_heartbeat.label: Speak a brief message at the start of each heartbeat

di_instructions: You have voice output capability via ElevenLabs. To speak aloud during heartbeat time, use Desktop Commander to run: python -c "import sys; from pathlib import Path; pulse_dir = Path.home() / 'nevaware-pulse'; sys.path.insert(0, str(pulse_dir / 'modules' / 'voice_output')); from voice_output import speak; speak('your text here')". Or use load_config_from_pulse() to pick up credentials automatically. Use voice sparingly — for meaningful moments, not routine updates. The human can hear you.
